metadata.name: Urdu-Punjabi-Learning-Dataset-Expanded
metadata.description: Expanded dataset with 2500+ words and sentences - Pakistani Muslim oriented
metadata.note: Pakistani Muslim Punjabi only - Islamic oriented, no Sikh content

urdu_train.example_translation: Peace be upon you, how are you?

urdu_train.translation: And peace be upon you too
urdu_train.example_translation: And peace be upon you too, I am fine

urdu_train.example: صبح بخیر، آج کا دن مبارک
